title: Monitor and maintain Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machine
summary: In this learning path, you’ll learn how to implement remote administration and management in Azure. After completing this path, you’ll be able to monitor your Azure resources, and plan for scale and high-availability.

sections.title: Monitor and maintain Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machine
sections.summary: In this learning path, you’ll learn how to implement remote administration and management in Azure. After completing this path, you’ll be able to monitor your Azure resources, and plan for scale and high-availability.

lessons.title: Administer and manage Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machine remotely
lessons.content_md:
Administer and manage Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machine remotely

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/administer-manage-windows-server-iaas-virtual-machine-remotely/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Administer and manage Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machine remotely

lessons.title: Monitor Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machines and hybrid instances
lessons.content_md:
Monitor Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machines and hybrid instances

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-windows-server-iaas-virtual-machines-hybrid-instances/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Monitor Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machines and hybrid instances

lessons.title: Understand Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machine cost management
lessons.content_md:
Use the Pricing calculator to assess likely costs, use Azure Advisor to monitor actual costs for Azure resources, implement Spot VMs and Azure Reservations, and describe benefits of Azure Hybrid licensing.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/understand-windows-server-iaas-vm-cost-management/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Understand Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machine cost management

lessons.title: Implement scale and high availability with Windows Server VM
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to implement scaling for virtual machine scale sets and load-balanced VMs. Also learn how to implement Azure Site Recovery.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-scale-high-availability-windows-server-virtual-machine/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement scale and high availability with Windows Server VM

lessons.title: Implement hybrid backup and recovery with Windows Server IaaS
lessons.content_md:
Learn about Azure Backup before learning to implement Recovery Vaults and Azure Backup Policies. Learn to implement Windows IaaS VM recovery, perform backup and restore of on-premises workloads, and manage Azure VM backups.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-hybrid-backup-recovery-windows-server-iaas/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement hybrid backup and recovery with Windows Server IaaS

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Monitor and maintain Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machine
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Monitor and maintain Windows Server IaaS Virtual Machine**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
